title: The Maid
author: Nita Prose
reason: A delightfully quirky protagonist and a mystery that keeps you guessing until the end!

title: The 7½ Deaths of Evelyn Hardcastle
author: Stuart Turton
reason: If you love Agatha Christie with a time-loop twist, this is perfect for our club.

title: Mexican Gothic
author: Silvia Moreno-Garcia
reason: Gothic atmosphere meets mystery - spooky but cozy at the same time.

title: The Appeal
author: Janice Hallett
reason: Told entirely through emails and messages - such a unique format!

title: A Gentleman in Moscow
author: Amor Towles
reason: Not a traditional mystery, but the intrigue and atmosphere are perfect for cozy reading.

title: The Westing Game
author: Ellen Raskin
reason: A classic puzzle mystery that's fun for all ages. Great for nostalgic readers!

title: In the Woods
author: Tana French
reason: Atmospheric Irish mystery with beautiful prose. The Dublin Murder Squad series is fantastic.

title: The House Across the Lake
author: Riley Sager
reason: Perfect lakeside thriller with plenty of twists. Great summer read!
